name: leibniz-fast
description: GPU-accelerated 2D matrix visualization for the browser

scripts.build:js: npx tsup js/index.ts --format esm --dts --out-dir dist && cp pkg/leibniz_fast_bg.wasm dist/
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:js
scripts.dev: npm run build:wasm && firefox http://localhost:8080/examples/basic/ & npx http-server . -p 8080
scripts.dev:chart: npm run build && firefox http://localhost:8080/examples/chart/ & npx http-server . -p 8080
scripts.lint:ts: npx prettier --check js/ && npx eslint js/
scripts.lint: npm run lint:rs && npm run lint:ts
